# `aube cache prune`

- **Usage**: `aube cache prune [--age-days <AGE_DAYS>] [--dry-run]`

Remove stale extracted primer files from the metadata cache

## Flags

### `--age-days <AGE_DAYS>`

Minimum age in days before an old primer file is removed

**Default:** `30`

### `--dry-run`

Do not actually delete anything
